qpdf 12.3.2 (https://qpdf.sourceforge.io/) is licensed under
the Apache License, Version 2.0:

  http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

The qpdf binaries bundled in this directory (qpdf.exe + qpdf30.dll)
are unmodified copies of the official MSVC64 release from
https://github.com/qpdf/qpdf/releases/tag/v12.3.2.

The accompanying msvcp140*.dll / vcruntime140*.dll / concrt140.dll
files are part of the Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable and are
distributed under the terms permitted by Microsoft for redistribution
alongside applications that depend on them.
